en: Now the apostles and the brothers who were throughout Judea heard that the Gentiles also had received the word of God.
zh: 使徒和在猶太的弟兄們，聽說外族人也接受了 神的道。

en: So when Peter went up to Jerusalem, the circumcision party criticized him, saying,
zh: 彼得上到耶路撒冷的時候，那些守割禮的人與他爭論，

en: "You went to uncircumcised men and ate with them."
zh: 說：“你竟然到未受割禮的人那裡，跟他們一起吃飯！”

en: But Peter began and explained it to them in order:
zh: 彼得就按著次序向他們講解，說：

en: "I was in the city of Joppa praying, and in a trance I saw a vision, something like a great sheet descending, being let down from heaven by its four corners, and it came down to me.
zh: “我在約帕城禱告的時候，魂遊象外，見到異象：有一件東西，好像一塊大布，綁著四角，從天上降下來，一直來到我面前。

en: Looking at it closely, I observed animals and beasts of prey and reptiles and birds of the air.
zh: 我定睛觀察，看見裡面有地上的四足牲畜、走獸，還有昆蟲和天空的飛鳥。

en: And I heard a voice saying to me, 'Rise, Peter; kill and eat.'
zh: 我也聽見有聲音對我說：‘彼得，起來，宰了吃！’

en: But I said, 'By no means, Lord; for nothing common or unclean has ever entered my mouth.'
zh: 我說：‘主啊，千萬不可，因為俗物或不潔的東西，從來沒有進過我的口。’

en: But the voice answered a second time from heaven, 'What God has made clean, do not call common.'
zh: 第二次又有聲音從天上回答：‘ 神所潔淨的，你不可當作俗物。’

en: This happened three times, and all was drawn up again into heaven.
zh: 這樣一連三次之後，所有的東西都拉回天上去了。

en: And behold, at that very moment three men arrived at the house in which we were, sent to me from Caesarea.
zh: 就在那個時候，有三個從該撒利亞派到我這裡來的人，站在我住的房子門前。

en: And the Spirit told me to go with them, making no distinction. These six brothers also accompanied me, and we entered the man's house.
zh: 聖靈吩咐我跟他們一起去，一點也不要疑惑。這六位弟兄也跟我一起去，我們就進了那人的家。

en: And he told us how he had seen the angel stand in his house and say, 'Send to Joppa and bring Simon who is called Peter;
zh: 他告訴我們，他怎樣看見天使站在他家裡說：‘派人到約帕去，請那個名叫彼得的西門來，

en: he will declare to you a message by which you will be saved, you and all your household.'
zh: 他有話要告訴你，使你和你全家都可以得救。’

en: As I began to speak, the Holy Spirit fell on them just as on us at the beginning.
zh: 我一開始講話，聖靈就降在他們身上，正像當初降在我們身上一樣。

en: And I remembered the word of the Lord, how he said, 'John baptized with water, but you will be baptized with the Holy Spirit.'
zh: 我就想起主所說的話：‘約翰用水施洗，但你們要受聖靈的洗。’

en: If then God gave the same gift to them as he gave to us when we believed in the Lord Jesus Christ, who was I that I could stand in God's way?"
zh: 神既然把同樣的恩賜 給他們，像給我們這些信了主耶穌基督的人一樣，我是誰，我能夠阻止 神嗎？”

en: When they heard these things they fell silent. And they glorified God, saying, "Then to the Gentiles also God has granted repentance that leads to life."
zh: 眾人聽見這些話，就默然無聲，把榮耀歸給 神，說：“這樣看來， 神也把悔改的心賜給外族人，使他們得生命。”

en: Now those who were scattered because of the persecution that arose over Stephen traveled as far as Phoenicia and Cyprus and Antioch, speaking the word to no one except Jews.
zh: 那些因司提反事件遭受苦難而四散的門徒，一直走到腓尼基、塞浦路斯、安提阿；他們不對別人傳講，只對猶太人傳講。

en: But there were some of them, men of Cyprus and Cyrene, who on coming to Antioch spoke to the Hellenists also, preaching the Lord Jesus.
zh: 但其中有些塞浦路斯人和古利奈人，來到安提阿，也對希臘人傳講主耶穌。

en: And the hand of the Lord was with them, and a great number who believed turned to the Lord.
zh: 主的手與他們同在，信而歸主的人就多起來。

en: The report of this came to the ears of the church in Jerusalem, and they sent Barnabas to Antioch.
zh: 這事傳到耶路撒冷教會的耳中，他們就派巴拿巴到安提阿去。

en: When he came and saw the grace of God, he was glad, and he exhorted them all to remain faithful to the Lord with steadfast purpose,
zh: 他到了那裡，看見 神所施的恩，就很歡喜，勸勉眾人堅心靠主。

en: for he was a good man, full of the Holy Spirit and of faith. And a great many people were added to the Lord.
zh: 巴拿巴是個好人，滿有聖靈和信心，於是許多人歸了主。

en: So Barnabas went to Tarsus to look for Saul,
zh: 後來他到大數去找掃羅，

en: and when he had found him, he brought him to Antioch. For a whole year they met with the church and taught a great many people. And in Antioch the disciples were first called Christians.
zh: 找到了，就帶他來安提阿。足足有一年，他們一同在教會聚集，教導了許多人。門徒稱為基督徒，是從安提阿開始的。

en: Now in these days prophets came down from Jerusalem to Antioch.
zh: 那時，有幾位先知從耶路撒冷下到安提阿。

en: And one of them named Agabus stood up and foretold by the Spirit that there would be a great famine over all the world (this took place in the days of Claudius).
zh: 其中有一個名叫亞迦布的站起來，藉著聖靈指出天下將要有大饑荒；這事在革老丟時期果然發生了。

en: So the disciples determined, everyone according to his ability, to send relief to the brothers living in Judea.
zh: 於是門徒決定按著各人的力量捐款，好送給住在猶太的弟兄。

en: And they did so, sending it to the elders by the hand of Barnabas and Saul.
zh: 他們就這樣行了，由巴拿巴和掃羅經手送到長老們那裡。
